replies.msg: WandaVision第8集中有一個微妙的斯坦李復活節彩蛋； 萬達（Wanda）駕駛的汽車車牌在某些記憶場景中寫著“ Excelsior”。 拉丁詞的意思是“ Ever Upwards”，它在60年代成為Lee的口號，當時他在漫畫書信頁上寫了答覆。 看到Marvel設法將Stan Lee復活節彩蛋納入他們的表演和電影中，即使他已經去世，也很高興。

replies.msg: Scarlet Witch has Chaos power, the exact opposite of the Phoenix Force, which is the embodiment of order (essentially, I see it as the ultimate force of entropy, bringing the universe closer to "order" in the sense that when entropy has reached it maximum level, everything will be uniform and thus orderly). Many years ago, Scarlet Witch uttered "No more mutants" and stole the power of millions of mutants AND stopped any more from being born. It wasn't until the Phoenix Force posessed Scott Summers that he was able to undo that "spell." The nature of the two powers would have, in my mind, one of three effects: 1. They would annihilate one another, like matter and antimatter combining. 2. They would reach a beautiful harmony, Order and Chaos, and be incredibly powerful. 3. They would reject each other entirely and the Phoenix would search for a more suitable host.
